name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Huntington Park, CA's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2567 E 54th St provides same-day car title loans with flexible repayment terms.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates at 2567 E 54th St in Huntington Park, CA, providing convenient access to title loan services for residents of this South Los Angeles community. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday 10 AM to 5 PM, with trained loan specialists ready to help.

At this Huntington Park location, you can apply for car title loans with same-day approval and flexible repayment options. The team understands the financial needs of Huntington Park residents and works directly with customers to structure terms that fit their circumstances. For questions or to get pre-qualified, call +1 323-433-9706.

If you're a Huntington Park resident needing quick cash, bring your government-issued ID, proof of residency, vehicle registration, and proof of insurance when you visit. The application process typically takes about 30 minutes, and qualified applicants often leave with funds the same day.
pros: Borrower keeps and drives their car throughout the loan term
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No prepayment penalties on any loan product
Accepts poor or no credit — approval based on vehicle equity
255,000+ loans funded since 2012 — established operational track record
Accepts motorcycle and semi-truck titles, not just passenger cars
Free pre-qualification with no commitment required
cons: APR and interest rates are not disclosed anywhere on the public website
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default — not clearly disclosed on homepage
Only available in approximately 12 listed states, limiting geographic reach
Only 11 published reviews despite claiming 255K+ loans funded — thin social proof
Installment loan terms capped at 24 months, which may not reduce cost sufficiently on large balances
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor or no credit who need same-day emergency cash
Borrowers who need more than payday loan limits but cannot qualify for personal loans
People with equity in a motorcycle, semi-truck, or non-standard vehicle
Existing customers of the company's 18-state network who need repeat access
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best suited for vehicle owners with poor credit who need fast cash and have exhausted lower-cost options — the keep-your-car model and same-day funding are genuine advantages. The main caveat is that car title loans are among the most expensive consumer credit products available, and this company does not disclose its rates publicly, so borrowers must request terms before committing.
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 2567 E 54th St, Huntington Park, CA. Same-day approval and funding. Mon-Fri 9AM-7PM, Sat 10AM-5PM.
